local_validation.notes: The proof executes hEnv.StartResultStack(); from the original Rule.Match method body by resolving hEnv from the call environment and dispatching StartResultStack through the existing native method table.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: A .bml receiver call parsed from the thesis companion corpus can now execute through Form-native BodySource interpretation and the existing record/method primitives.
test_flows: python3 scripts/audit_bml_bmf_kernel_natives.py before commit to prove no new BML/BMF host-native semantics were introduced.

phase_gate.reason: This adds receiver.Method() execution. Full thesis parity still requires receiver calls with arguments, nested call arguments, conditionals, loops, casts, comparisons, exceptions, and full BMF rule execution from the known-working companion code.

evidence_refs: form/form-stdlib/grammars/bml.fk defines receiver-call0 recognition, counting, and execution in the BML language layer.
form/form-stdlib/tests/bml-thesis-rule-receiver-call-proof.fk proves hEnv.StartResultStack(); from original container-Rule.bml executes through method_invoke.
